title: Twisha Sharma SC hearing LIVE: CBI set to take over death case probe within a day
description: Twisha Sharma SC hearing LIVE: The matter was registered as “In Re: Alleged institutional bias and procedural discrepancies in the unnatural death of a young girl at her matrimonial home” and was heard by a bench led by CJI Surya Kant, justices Joymalya Bagchi and Vipul M Pancholi.
